description: The 2nd-generation NSX goes out of production as it should have been from the start. It features a revised battery pack, re-tuned 9-speed DCT transmission, and turbochargers from the NSX GT3 to produce 600 horsepower and 667 newton-meters of torque; the power figures that it should have packed when the NSX was introduced back in 2016.
creator: DodgeDemon
